kevin@kevin-cpu:~/marin-harbor$ which codex
/home/kevin/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.2/bin/codex tried upgrading codex but still not updated?

content.text:
Try clearing the npm cache and reinstalling:

```
npm install -g @openai/codex@latest
```

If that still shows 0.89.0, check if there are multiple installations:

```
npm list -g @openai/codex
```

Also, sometimes the shell caches the binary path. After installing, run:

```
hash -r
codex version
```

If `npm list -g` shows the old version even after install, it may have failed silently. Run the install with verbose output to see what's happening:

```
npm install -g @openai/codex@latest --verbose
```
